metadata.title: About | Passvero
metadata.description: Learn why we are building Passvero and how we help European businesses manage product information more simply.

hero.title: Building simpler Digital Product Passport tools for European businesses.
hero.description: Passvero is being created to help small and medium-sized manufacturers, importers and distributors organise, manage and publish structured product information.

why.title: Product information should be clear, connected and accessible.
why.description: Smaller businesses need a practical path from disconnected files to structured product information they can maintain and share with confidence.

scattered.title: Scattered information
scattered.body: Important product data is often spread across spreadsheets, PDFs and internal systems.

complexity.title: Overly complex tools
complexity.body: Enterprise software can be more complex than smaller teams need for their everyday work.

accessibility.title: More accessible workflows
accessibility.body: Passvero aims to make product transparency and Digital Product Passport workflows easier to adopt and maintain.

audience.title: For businesses that make, import and distribute products across Europe.
audience.description: Passvero is designed for teams that need a clear system for product information without unnecessary complexity.

company.title: Developed with practical business experience.
company.body: Passvero is developed and operated by {company}, an established Croatian company with practical experience working with technical products and business customers.

cta.title: Want a simpler way to manage your product information?
cta.description: Tell us what your team needs and request early access to Passvero.

metadata.title: Contact | Passvero
metadata.description: Contact Passvero with questions about product information, Digital Product Passports and early access.

hero.title: Let’s talk about your product data.
hero.description: Have a question about Passvero, Digital Product Passports or early access? Contact us directly and we will be happy to help.

email.title: Send us an email
email.description: For general questions or to discuss what your team needs, email us at:

company.title: Who operates Passvero
company.body: Passvero is developed and operated by {company}.

earlyAccess.title: Interested in Passvero?
earlyAccess.description: Send us an early access request and tell us briefly what your team needs.

ContactPage.responseNote: We will respond as soon as possible.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy | Passvero
metadata.description: Information about how Passvero handles personal data on its marketing website.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This policy describes the current handling of personal data on the public Passvero marketing website.

scope.title: Scope
scope.body: This policy applies to the public pages at passvero.eu. The current website does not provide user accounts, a contact form or embedded analytics.

data.title: Data we may process
data.body: When you contact us by email, we process your email address, message content and any information you choose to provide. Server and security infrastructure may process technical request logs, such as IP address, browser type and access time, to deliver and protect the service.

use.title: How we use data
use.body: We use data to respond to enquiries and Early Access requests, maintain website security and reliability, and meet applicable legal obligations.

sharing.title: Data sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell personal data. Data may be processed by hosting, infrastructure and email providers only as needed to provide those services or where required by law.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: We retain correspondence for as long as reasonably needed to respond and maintain business records. Technical logs are subject to infrastructure-provider retention periods and security needs.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion or restriction of your personal data, and object to certain processing.

security.title: Security and contact
security.body: We apply reasonable technical and organisational safeguards. To ask a question or exercise your rights, contact us using the public email address below.

metadata.title: Cookie Policy | Passvero
metadata.description: Information about the current use of cookies and browser storage on the Passvero website.

Cookies.title: Cookie Policy
Cookies.intro: This policy describes the current use of cookies and similar technologies at passvero.eu.

overview.title: Current status
overview.body: The marketing application code currently does not set cookies or use localStorage or sessionStorage.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary technologies
necessary.body: Passvero currently has no first-party necessary cookies. A hosting or security infrastructure provider may use strictly necessary technical mechanisms to deliver the site, prevent abuse and maintain reliability.

locale.title: Language selection
locale.body: The language is determined from the URL. Automatic locale detection is disabled, and Passvero does not set a cookie to remember language selection.

analytics.title: Analytics and advertising
analytics.body: We currently do not use analytics, advertising or marketing cookies, tracking pixels or tracking scripts. Therefore, no non-essential cookie-consent banner is displayed.

control.title: Browser controls
control.body: Your browser settings let you inspect, block and delete cookies. Blocking necessary infrastructure technologies may affect site availability or security.

changes.title: Changes and contact
changes.body: If we introduce analytics or other non-essential technologies, we will update this policy and request consent before loading them where required. Contact us by email with questions.

metadata.title: Terms of Service | Passvero
metadata.description: Terms governing access to and use of the Passvero platform and services.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: These terms describe the rules that apply when accessing and using the Passvero service.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.body: These terms govern access to https://passvero.eu and use of the Passvero service. By accessing the service, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

service.title: 2. Service description
service.body: Passvero provides tools for managing, structuring and publishing product information, including Digital Product Passport workflows. Passvero is not legal certification and does not guarantee regulatory compliance for any product or published data.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility and account responsibility
eligibility.body: You may use the service only if you can enter into a binding agreement for yourself or the organization you represent. You are responsible for accurate account information, the confidentiality of access credentials and all activity under your account.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: You must not use the service unlawfully, infringe another person's rights, distribute malicious content, disrupt the service or its security, gain unauthorized access to systems, or publish deceptive information.

productData.title: 5. Product data and customer responsibility
productData.body: You remain responsible for the accuracy, completeness, legality and necessary rights for all product data, documents and other content you enter or publish. You must review information before publication and ensure it meets applicable legal and contractual obligations.

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: Passvero and its software, design and service content are protected by applicable intellectual-property rights. We do not take ownership of your data; you grant us only the rights needed to host, process and display it to provide the service.

thirdPartyServices.title: 7. Third-party services
thirdPartyServices.body: The service may rely on hosting, email, storage or other third-party providers. Their services may be subject to separate terms and policies, and Passvero does not control their availability.

availability.title: 8. Service availability and changes
availability.body: We aim to keep the service available and reliable but do not promise uninterrupted or error-free operation. We may change, restrict or suspend the service for maintenance, security, legal requirements or product development.

disclaimer.title: 9. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The service is provided as available and, to the extent permitted by applicable law, without express or implied warranties. Information made available through the service is not legal advice or a substitute for professional review.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the extent permitted by applicable law, Passvero is not liable for indirect, incidental, special or consequential losses, or for lost profits, data or business opportunities arising from use of the service. Mandatory rights and liabilities that cannot lawfully be limited remain unaffected.

termination.title: 11. Termination
termination.body: You may stop using the service at any time. We may restrict or terminate access for a material breach of these terms, a security risk, unlawful use, or where needed to protect the service and other users.

governingLaw.title: 12. Governing law
governingLaw.body: Governing law and jurisdiction are determined by applicable mandatory rules and, where relevant, the customer agreement. These terms do not exclude any mandatory rights that apply.

contact.title: 13. Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact Passvero at contact@passvero.eu. Service information is available at https://passvero.eu.

changes.title: 14. Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms as the product, business model or legal requirements evolve. We will publish the updated version and identify its last-updated date, with additional notice for material changes where appropriate.

Footer.summary: A platform for creating and managing Digital Product Passports with clear, structured product information.
